action.reasoning: Observation: MetricGAN+ baseline is strong (test PESQ 3.134), and validation tuning showed simple blending/gain does not improve over raw MetricGAN. Analysis: a learned post-filter on top of MetricGAN may improve PESQ while retaining a safe fallback. I will train a small STFT residual magnitude post-filter using cached MetricGAN outputs; the script will compare validation PESQ against raw MetricGAN and save an automatic checkpoint that disables the post-filter unless validation gain exceeds a threshold, reducing risk. Decision: implement the post-filter model/training and submit the auto-selected checkpoint for evaluation.
